channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-14 22:18 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: I like to test the styles generated by Grok Imagine.
item.description: I like to test the styles generated by Grok Imagine.

item.title: @elonmusk: Powerwall 3 is coming to Japan this year Sign up to receive updates
item.description: Powerwall 3 is coming to Japan this year Sign up to receive updates

item.title: @elonmusk: Here is a little video I made using the new Grok video feature where you can animate more than one i...
item.description: Here is a little video I made using the new Grok video feature where you can animate more than one image in a video. I also published an article below so you can see how I did it. Very simple! Lots of fun 🙂

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 ranks #2 on 𝜏²-Bench for Telecom Agentic Tool Use on Artificial Analysis with 96.5% accura...
item.description: Grok 4.20 ranks #2 on 𝜏²-Bench for Telecom Agentic Tool Use on Artificial Analysis with 96.5% accuracy, outperforming Claude Opus 4.6 (max), GPT-5.4 (xhigh), and Gemini 3.1 Pro, while closing in on GLM-5 Tool calling is where the whole game is for AI agents, and this is where Grok 4.20 takes over

item.title: @elonmusk: The computational power in your iPhone is >100 million times more powerful than the computers that l...
item.description: The computational power in your iPhone is >100 million times more powerful than the computers that landed Apollo 11 on the Moon. And yet, most people use it primarily to argue with strangers on the internet. The future's already here—we just need to deploy it better.

item.title: @elonmusk: Hey Instagram users, come use X Chat 😎
item.description: Hey Instagram users, come use X Chat 😎

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 Beta just took No1 on Artificial Analysis and scored in reasoning, intelligence, performan...
item.description: Grok 4.20 Beta just took No1 on Artificial Analysis and scored in reasoning, intelligence, performance, and price analysis. - Lowest hallucination rate EVER: 22% - No1 Instruction Following: 82.9% on IFBench - 265 tokens/sec - fastest in class, >2x Grok 4.1 Fast Very remarkable because Grok 4.20 was released just about a month ago and is still in Beta. Huge congrats to xAI & Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: Recreated the iconic Iron Man movie scene using Grok Imagine’s new feature.
item.description: Recreated the iconic Iron Man movie scene using Grok Imagine’s new feature.

item.title: @elonmusk: Image and 30-second video created with Grok Imagine in under 5 minutes. 1. Image creation with editi...
item.description: Image and 30-second video created with Grok Imagine in under 5 minutes. 1. Image creation with editing 2. Animation 3. 10-second video extension 4. 10-second video extension Your video is ready ❣️

item.title: @elonmusk: Ages of the Founding Fathers on July 4, 1776: -James Monroe, 18 -Aaron Burr, 20 -Alexander Hamilton,...
item.description: Ages of the Founding Fathers on July 4, 1776: -James Monroe, 18 -Aaron Burr, 20 -Alexander Hamilton, 21 -James Madison, 25 -Thomas Jefferson, 33 There is indeed a problem with people today being unserious, but to pretend that age itself is the problem is ridiculous

item.title: @elonmusk: The new upgrade of Grok Imagine is absolutely 🔥🔥 Download@Grokand try it now.
item.description: The new upgrade of Grok Imagine is absolutely 🔥🔥 Download@Grokand try it now.
